Toothless from the "HTTYD infection" AU by [sneebsnop](https://www.instagram.com/sneebsnop/) on Instagram.
I loved so much this AU(Alternative Universe) of "How to train your Dragon" that I couldn't hold back my desire to make a Toothless bot of that AU
